ingredients_text: French bread (enriched wheat flour [flour, malted barley flour, niacin, reduced iron, thiamine mononitrate, riboflavin, folic acid], water, soybean oil, contains 2% or less of salt, sugar, yeast, dough conditioner [wheat flour, ascorbic acid, enzymes], soy lecithin, non fat dry milk), sauce (water, tomato paste, seasoning blend [sugar, modified food starch, salt, spice, dried garlic, maltodextrin, hydrolyzed soy and corn protein, paprika, dried onion]), low moisture part skim mozzarella cheese (cultured pasteurized part skim milk, salt, enzymes), pepperoni made with pork, chicken and beef (pork, mechanically separated chicken, beef, salt, contains 2% or less of water, dextrose, spices, smoke flavoring, flavoring, lactic acid starter culture, sodium ascorbate, garlic powder, oleoresin of paprika, sodium nitrite, citric acid, bha, bht).
